nasb.text: They helped David against the band of raiders, for they were all mighty men of valor, and were captains in the army.

esv.text: They helped David against the band of raiders, for they were all mighty men of valor and were commanders in the army.

cnv.text: 他們幫助大衛，與他一同攻擊賊匪；他們全是英勇的戰士，是軍隊的領袖。

ccb.text: 他们都是将领，作战英勇，帮助大卫抗击匪徒。
